coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Relax. Breathe. Enjoy the ride. 7:00 of engine-building.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Seated position, 85-100 rpm. Zone 2: building aerobic base correctly.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Building the base. 7:00 at 75%. This is where champions are made.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 75% FTP. This is so easy it's almost boring. Almost.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 0% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: First block at 95%. This is race pace. If you can't hold this, you can't race. Simple.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Starting sweet spot work. 95% just below FTP. You should maintain this for 20+ minutes.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Starting threshold work. This is the bread and butter of cycling fitness. Embrace it.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Block 1/5. 5:00 in the space between 'fine' and 'please make it stop.'
coachingNotes.MIXED: First threshold block. 5:00 at 95-95%. Smooth and steady.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 3:00 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 20% complete. Rep 1/1. 55% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First interval. 55% for 3:00. Set the standard. You've got this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 15 minutes of threshold work done. Block 2/5. Don't fade now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Progressive fatigue building. 5min threshold work accumulated. Maintain 82-90 rpm — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Block 1/5. 7:00 at 97%. You're building the engine that wins races.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Threshold: where you live between motivation and regret. Currently: regret. Block 2/5.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Block 2/5. Comfortably hard. Breathe deep. Trust the process.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 4:00 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 2/5. 55% FTP, Seated. 4:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 4:00 at 55%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway: 43% done. Your mind is weak. Your body is stronger. 24 minutes left.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Midpoint: 26 minutes in. 98% at 75-85 rpm. Maximize time at threshold without crossing to VO2.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway: 43% done. You're not fading, you're adapting. 2 blocks left.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway: 43% complete. Congratulations! You've found where optimism goes to die.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 43% done. Check your form. Relax shoulders. Maintain 98%.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 4:00 at 55%. This hurts because it's supposed to. Set the tone.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1. 21min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. You're starting fresh. Show yourself what you're capable of.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 58% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1. 0 to go. 20 minutes total. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Block 4/5. The discomfort is the adaptation. Embrace it. 1 more blocks to build FTP.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Block 4/5. 65% complete. Hold 97% steady. 13 minutes remain.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 65% complete. Block 4/5. This is where mediocre riders crack. You're pushing through.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 65% done. 1 blocks left. Only. ONLY. *laughs maniacally*
coachingNotes.MIXED: Set 4: 7:00 at 97%. Focus on efficient pedal stroke. 1 blocks remaining.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 77% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1 of 1. Target: 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. 0 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 77% done. 0 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 77% done. 0 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
coachingNotes.MIXED: 77% into session. 55%, 85-95 rpm. Focus and execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Final block. 5:00 at 95%. Then 5min cooldown. Don't you dare fade.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final threshold block: 5:00 at 95%. Then 5min easy. Hold power steady.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final block! Everything you've built leads to this. 5:00 at 95%. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Starting threshold work. Fun fact: FTP stands for 'Finally This Pain.' (It doesn't, but it should.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Last threshold interval. 95% FTP, 95-105 rpm. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 90% done. 0 intervals left. 0 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 90% complete. Rep 1/1. 60% at 85-100 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 90% through. This is your workout. Own it. 60% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. 54 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 0 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1. 0 to go. 0 minutes total. You've got this.
